name: Roman Holiday Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped fresh basil or 1 1/2 tsp Dried basil
2 cups Drained, canned or cooked white beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion and carrots in olive oil until onion is translucent.
2. Add green beans, macaroni, broth, and salt. Bring to boil and simmer for about 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender and macaroni is cooked.
3. In a medium bowl, combine tomato paste, garlic, basil, and cheese. Slowly whisk in oil.
4. Stir the mixture into the stew pot. Dissolve cornstarch in water and stir into soup over medium heat until soup has thickened slightly.
5. Stir in white beans and heat through.
